name: OfferPostmenopausalNeoadjuvantEndocrineTherapy
title: Offer aromatase inhibitor based neoadjuvant endocrine therapy for postmenopausal downstaging
description: Use neoadjuvant endocrine therapy with an aromatase inhibitor in postmenopausal HR-positive HER2-negative disease to increase locoregional treatment options.

coding.display: Hormone receptor positive with human epidermal growth factor receptor 2 negative status
